notes: Chapter 568 (HCR 3009), Executive Branch Article, repeals the present article V and creates a new article V. Measure preamble: 'to create and enact a new article V ... and to repeal the present article V'. SECTION 2 reads 'A new section to a new article V of the Constitution of North Dakota is created and enacted as follows:' with no strikethrough/underline markup. SECTION 13 (REPEAL): 'The present article V of the Constitution of North Dakota is repealed.' Prior (pre-1997) executive-article text is not derivable from this measure.

Chapter 568 new-article-V enactment; SECTION 3 'A new section to a new article V ... is created and enacted as follows:' with no markup. Old article V repealed by SECTION 13. No prior text in this measure.
